seoTitle: Middleton Beach vs Midvale — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Middleton Beach and Midvale. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Middleton Beach vs Midvale: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Middleton Beach and Midvale.
heading: Middleton Beach vs Midvale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Middleton Beach, Western Australia and Midvale, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Middleton Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Midvale (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Middleton Beach or Midvale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Middleton Beach has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Midvale scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Middleton Beach scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Midvale scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Middleton Beach or Midvale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Middleton Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.78% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
